final:
module shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [1:0] q
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 2'b00; // Asynchronous reset
        end else begin
            q <= {q[0], serial_in}; // Shift left
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (serial_in) begin
        q <= 2'b11;
      end else begin
        q <= 2'b00;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
